I attempted to communicate clearly and thoroughly to this firm the underlying facts and circumstances of my case, particularly as they relate to a personal injury matter involving my children. One of my children, who is only eight years old, has been diagnosed with Phelan-McDermid Syndrome and receives Supplemental Security Income (SSI) due to significant medical and developmental needs.

Despite my efforts to present these facts accurately and in good faith, it has become evident that this firm is not prioritizing the substantive legal and civil rights issues at hand. Instead, their focus appears to be disproportionately centered on financial compensation and billing practices—charging by the hour or minute—without meaningful regard for the facts or the human impact involved.

I guess, according to this law firm, personal injury doesn’t include your children. That message has been made painfully clear. It is deeply concerning that the pursuit of justice seems secondary to financial interests, and that the voices of vulnerable individuals, especially children with disabilities, are being overlooked in the process.

As an attorney, Robbie is superb. He consistently showed respect to his client and to us, the family. Throughout the legal process, he was honest, kept us informed on status, and provided an excellent outcome. We highly recommend Robbie!

It's rare to come by attorneys who care as much about and for their clients, much less as much as Robbie. He is one of the most committed, talented, hard-working attorneys I've ever worked with, and I highly recommend anyone to him that needs legal assistance.
Robbie and his team represented me through a very harrowing experience and helped vindicate me of charges levied against me. His team will be my go to if I am ever in need of representation again.

reviews.text: A friend of mine had some traffic offenses. The first thing Ryan Kolbeck did was call us back soon - other's didn't. We had a preliminary consultation during which Ryan suggested a strategy for dealing with my friend's situation. Shortly thereafter I received a call from the prosecuting attorney to discuss the case - for me this discussion was unexpected, unplanned. On the spot I proposed to the DA what Ryan had suggested. The DA cooperated completely and went with along the reasonable proposal I made but which actually originated with Ryan. As I write this the case is completely resolved due to me following Ryan's counsel. I subsequently met Ryan to thank him for his help and to offer him at least some payment for what amounted to spot on legal advice. He declined payment - our thanks was enough for him. Sooo - Ryan Kolbeck's legal acumen was excellent in this situation, and him declining payment for that initial consultation demonstrates beyond a shadow of a doubt - "he ain't no money grubbin lawyer." Thanks a million Ryan! Bill Kinderman
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you William!  Happy this worked out like it did

I recently had the privilege of working with Matt Skinner on a legal matter that could have drastically changed the course of my life. Facing a felony charge was an incredibly daunting experience for me, and I was understandably a nervous wreck throughout the process. However, from our first meeting, Matt’s professionalism, knowledge, and unwavering support made all the difference.

Matt took the time to explain every detail of my case, ensuring I understood my options and what to expect. He was patient with my many questions and concerns, addressing them with empathy and clarity. Despite a few conflicts that arose due to my anxiety, Matt remained calm and focused, guiding me through each step with confidence. His ability to reassure me during those tense moments was invaluable.

Thanks to Matt’s hard work and dedication, we were able to reduce my felony charge to a misdemeanor, which was a tremendous relief. I truly felt like I had the best attorney by my side, someone who genuinely cared about my future and worked tirelessly to achieve a positive outcome.

The office environment is also worth mentioning; it is run professionally yet feels welcoming and friendly. The staff was always courteous and efficient, making the whole process smoother than I could have imagined.

I cannot recommend Matt Skinner highly enough. If you find yourself in need of a skilled and compassionate attorney, look no further. He truly changed my life for the better, and I am forever grateful for his guidance and support. Thank you, Matt!

The thing about car accidents and personal injury cases, is that they can be very complex and require a high level of detailed legal analysis. If you don't contact an attorney early in your case,  or if you don't have sufficient medical documentation; you run a risk of losing opportunities to recover for your legitimate injuries. I have known Mike Shubeck professionally for three years. He is unique in his training. He has significant background working with Gregory Yates who is an attorney in California. As a result of that professional mentorship, Mr. Shubeck has devoted years of practice in very large scale complex litigation from a much larger jurisdiction. He is able to bring that level of knowledge and experience to the local car accident and personal injury case. I highly recommend contacting Mr. Shubeck early in your car accident case to help get the recovery you are entitled to.

Seriously, if you ever find yourself needing a personal injury lawyer, RUN, don't walk, to Hoy Trial Lawyers! After my accident about two years ago, I was a complete mess – physically and mentally. Luckily, I found Char and Scott, and they have been absolute rockstars!
From day one, they fought tooth and nail for me, making sure I got the medical attention I needed and relentlessly pursuing the settlement I deserved. These guys are like legal pit bulls with hearts of gold! 💖
What truly impressed me was their incredible communication. They ALWAYS kept me in the loop, explaining every step of the process in a way that even *I* could understand (and trust me, legal jargon usually goes right over my head!). They patiently walked me through everything making a stressful situation unbelievably easy to navigate, especially while I was trying to recover from my injuries. Char, Scott and Lynn went above and beyond, and I am eternally grateful for their dedication and hard work. If you want a team that will fight for you, keep you informed, and genuinely care about your well-being, look no further than Hoy Trial Lawyers. You won't regret it! 👍

reviews.text:
Attorney Julius is in a class of her own. Words cannot express how much our family appreciates her expertise and how her and her staff (shout out to Lori!) are just the best at what they do. If you need the best representation, look no further than the law office of Margo Julius.
Additional note: The process is not fast or easy. However, you will have homework and things that must be done on your end. Do not expect to retain their services and then just sit back and do nothing. It is a full team effort.
Outstanding job everyone. Thank you!!!

Margo and Lori were awesome. !!! After a long process of trying to apply for disability alone they got it done quick. She really cares !!! My only complaint is that I should of contacted them sooner......

I sustained a work injury that almost fully ripped for my arm, and social security disability didn't want to help. Margo helped me get social security disability benefits. She is an amazing lawyer, I'm so glad to have had her as my lawyer for the case.

I had the pleasure of working with Margo at Margo Julius Law Prof. LLC, and I couldn't be more impressed with her services. She took the time to listen to my situation thoroughly and was quick to find a solution. Her knowledge of the law is extensive, and it was clear from the start that I was in capable hands. I truly feel that I couldn’t have been taken care of any better. Highly recommend her for anyone needing legal assistance!
Experienced, honest, organized, good listening ears. She helped me get the best possible outcome with my disability case.

Margo and I went on a 2 year journey together after I almost lost my life in a terrible auto accident. I simply was sitting in a medical hospice facility and saw an ad on TV and called when I realized my life was getting destroyed. She fought to get $180,000 in medical billing taken care of and when I was declared a crime victim she not only fought the auto insurance companies but was able to execute on a civil suit against the individual who was criminally negligent and intoxicated. There were times we both thought we hit a wall but she stuck with me the whole way!

I was jumping through the Social Security Disability hoops for 2+ years and getting nowhere! I finally sought the help of Margo Julius Law. With Margo’s knowledge and expertise, I was able to get 2 years back pay and monthly Social Security Disability payments within a year! Margo and her staff are wonderful to work with! They kept me informed and answered all my questions each step along the way. I would highly recommend visiting with Margo to see if she would be able to help you!

Margo was very professional, caring, and helpful. She guided us through the process and was very timely and thorough in her communication. I would highly recommend her services, especially for navigating the social security system.

Ashley was amazing to work with. Thanks to her hard work, my case was resolved quickly and in my favor. I highly recommend Ashley to anyone in need of legal assistance. She made a stressful situation much more manageable, and I am forever grateful for her help.
They claim they want to help, but clearly don’t.

Ashley is everything amazing. She is kind and truly cares about her clients. Very knowledgeable and breaks everything down the way a good lawyer should. Takes time to make sure all your questions and concerns are answered.

Highly recommend! Kasey is very knowledgeable and amazing to work with! She knows what she’s talking about and wholeheartedly we felt the whole time she had our best interest at heart. She was very patient and answered all of our questions in detail. We will be using her again in the future for our future business decisions/transactions.

Best Attorney office in South Dakota.🙌🏽💯 They do a very phenomenal job and represent you very well. Ashley helped me through everything, and made every step of the way easier for a dismissal on my case.Very professional at what she does and so is everyone else that works here. They put in the hard work and make sure you're well taken care of. I appreciate everything they did for me and I highly recommend them to anyone.

Wow. That is all I can say about Kasey and Ashley. I recently hired them to help me with a legal matter and a pretty tough situation in life that I had to navigate through...easily one of the best decisions i've ever made. I have never dealt with a duo as competent, compassionate, and responsive as these two. Every meeting was prompt, concise, and I left there feeling like I was their only client with clear, level-headed advice. If you are searching for someone to help you through any legal matter, I promise that you will not regret hiring them.

Ashley represented me on a long, drawn out battle and was amazing.   She provided me with by far the best service and communication I have received and always treated me with the upmost respect and dignity. I feel she took the time to get to know me as a person.  Kasey, the paralegals, and ladies in the office also got to know me by name and were always very courteous and went out of their way to help with whatever I needed.
They all make a great team and I would recommend Olivier Miles Holtz, LLP to anyone.

I recently hired Kasey Olivier (Olivier Miles Holtz Law Firm) to handle a personal issue I needed counsel in. I AM GLAD IT DID! Kasey handled every situation gracefully, knowledgeable, and was able to settle my case exactly how I had hoped. The best part was that she regularly checked in with me, gave me updates, and was available whenever I needed her or had questions. Moving forward, I will hire this law firm to handle any situation I need litigation in because I believe they are the best in the business. Thank you Kasey!
Ashley and Kasey did a great job representing my business. They were responsive, professional and thorough at all times. I highly recommend them!

Our company recently hired Olivier Miles Holtz, LLP and was VERY impressed with their promptness, professionalism, attention to detail and of course, the results. If you’re searching for a litigation attorney that gets the job done, make it a priority to contact the team at Olivier Miles Holtz, LLP.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Mr. Mull. It was our pleasure to assist you and thank you so much for your business and review!

reviews.text: Absolutely horrible and dishonest. He refused to share information that was important to my case  which is unethical! He overcharged me. Never got me a court date for child support ever. Hired another lawyer and got court date in three weeks. He’s rude, condescending. And his ego is more important than his client. Be prepared to pay a lot with minimal results. I’m reporting him for not dis losing information. Save your money. Hire someone else.
Ken Tschetter was my attorney in a custody case his whole team was amazing and helped me so much .

I retained Ken Tschetter for a custody/visitation case. This guy was the biggest waste of time and money. I had to retain him for $2,000 dollars and then I got charged another $3,000 once the hearing was done. For $5,000 dollars all this guy did was side with the other party, argue with his client, did little to no research on the matter at hand, and was completely worthless in the courtroom. If you want an attorney to NOT represent your best interests then this is your guy. If you want some who WILL do the things they say then go find someone else because this guy simply isn’t worth it.

It’s been a few years but I have to say that if you ever need a lawyer. Ken Tschetter and his team are the BEST to have on your side. When I was in need of lawyer, I had trouble finding one to represent me. There were several lawyers that turned me away. I had some that wouldn’t even speak with me until I paid their retainer fee. Ken actually took the time to call me and listened to my story. He then meant with me in person, took the time to listen and ask questions. From the beginning ken treated me with respect, was very caring and understanding. He was so patient with me while I was uncontrollably sobbing in between telling my story. Ken and his team worked hard and diligently  to make sure I got the best possible outcome with my divorce settlement. I would recommend Ken and his team to anyone looking for a great divorce or family lawyer! Thank again Ken.
I worked with Ken Tschetter found him to be honest reliable and an excellent experience. Highly recommend 100 stars
Ken represented me in my divorce case and fought hard for a fair agreement. I felt like he truly had my best interests at heart.

My experience with this law office was extremely well.  Specially with Matthew Theophilus.  He was very helpful.  His communication was A+.   He was able to work with us in a prompt manner even though we were in a different State .  Our case was solved.   Also Debra was very helpful.  Thank you  Matt !   Gracias !!
I had one of there attorney representing me Matt theopulus. He did nothing and threw a massive temper tantrum when he didn't respond to my emails. I should have fired him do not hire this law firm

Jamie Webber (in my opinion) shows no Compassion, no care, no drive or fight for her clients. She seems Incompetent in the court room in her ability to fight for her clients. Her willingness to back her clients isn't there. She more backed her ex-husband & his lawyer then her client.
It's all about her getting paid.  She's getting payments & yet she stopped fighting for her client. It's all about the money for her, not her clients out come or future.
& watch for double billing!!

Jamie Weber has been a beacon of hope in my very long contentious divorce/child custody proceedings. Her knowledge, expertise in family law and overall confidence and attitude towards my situation made it apparent that we were and continue to be prepared for every issue or event that surfaces. She has been incredibly professional, persistent, and compassionate throughout the entire process. Her communication skills are unmatched. She is very responsive to my concerns and able to clearly advocate my needs. When something arises, she is quick to explain and ease my worries. I’m proud to say that Jamie is my attorney and I highly recommend Jamie to anyone who is looking for a family law attorney. She will fight with you in your case.

I am proud to say that Jamie Weber is my attorney. Five long months of meticulous and painstaking hard work on her part. We had our hearing today and not only did we win, it was a resounding victory.
She obtained every piece of evidence, she obtained police recordings and she obtained body cam footage from the officers that I called regarding our case. Her paralegal, Tari Nesseth, and her assistant, Norah DeBoer,  worked tirelessly.
I cannot express enough gratitude and appreciation to Jamie Weber for what she did for my 12 year old daughter and me. If you want an attorney that will fight for you, please give her a call.

This Firm is a family civil Rights Law Firm 1st & 2nd.
And I really appreciate the opportunity to be their client.
KLw964

Jaime Weber was very comforting during my child support modification case.  She made the daunting legal process much less confusing.   She was also able to find fair terms for me.  She is a valuable asset in any legal case.

I want to say thank goodness for Ken! I have had my fair share of attorneys and I wish I would have found him first, I know a lot of things would be different if I did! He has been nothing but amazing in everything I have done with him and his firm. He is very polite, professional, and always gets back to me right away even if to let me know he needs to look into something.  If you want someone that is going to go the extra mile go with Ken! He has helped me on lawsuits, legal advice with our business, child custody he does it all, and if he doesn’t know something about it, he will make sure do his homework and find out! I highly remembered him!

Hired him for custody court. Hardly in touch with me and when court came around, whatever accusations the defendant had, he just let the judge believe. I was a victim of domestic violence, I was attacked, and I had my kids taken away. I had my victims rights but those dont matter anymore. My ex had no evidence, just accusations. My lawyer seemed like he was more on my ex husband's side. Complete was of time and money. I had videos. pictures, and screenshots of my ex doing things wrong but my lawyer says he wasn't or work around it. But if I was doing things my ex was pulling, then I would be in  contempt of court and arrested or I'm the awful parent. Complete disappointment to me and my kids.  All I wanted is 50/50 and a smooth divorce to keep my kids out of it. So far it has been nothing but a confusing nightmare for my kids and myself. As someone who can pass a federal and state background check with finger prints along with guardianship training with no related charges or any charges since 2013 be so awful.  Ken treated me like I was some poor trash off the street when I don't know what would've gave him that impression considering I gave him the retainer check right then. Seems very judgmental.

If there were 6 stars, I’d choose 6 stars. Ken did an amazing job at representing me. Ken is very knowledgeable at his work he does. He is very honest and listens closely. Ken is easy to talk to, and he is very easy to get ahold of. Ken did work on his days off, during the weekends, and would even email me during the weekends with keeping me up to date. He is very serious but knows when to have fun and get to know you. I will recommend Ken to anyone. I can’t thank him enough.

Highly recommend! I reached out to Mr. O'Leary to try and get some legal advice. Before we spoke, he took the time to research the matter so he could give specific advice as to next steps to take. Very professional yet very personable as well.

Mark O’Leary is exceptional! Great advisor and consummate professional. Highly knowledgeable and experienced in litigation matters. Dependable and fair. Mr O’Leary is personable and easily relatable individual. Felt very comfortable working with him. Highly recommend for any business or individual legal matters.

I spoke with Mr. O'Leary today to gain some insight for a problem at hand. Though my particular situation was not his area of expertise, he still took the time out to listen to me and referred some resources of help. In our moment of conversation, he exuded professionalism, empathy and diligence. Would definitely recommend.

- Hannah B.

Even though Mr. Oleary was not my lawyer, and I was just in search for legal help/advice.... he way gracious enough to give me a few moments out of his day, along with information  other legal advisors to reach out to. Thanks Mr Oleary.
They helped me when no other attorney had the time to listen.

While considering purchasing a franchise, I spoke with Michael to get his expertise. He reviewed the franchise contract in a timely manor and followed up with his findings. He is professional and efficient. I would have no issues in utilizing his expertise again.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks Josh, please reach out if we can be of further assistance.

reviews.text: Well just got off the phone trying to get advice. I was in the middle explaining it then he said he had to go had another call. And hung up. Not really professional in my book. Will not consider him since he doesn't value his clients or possible clients.
reviews.ownerResponse: Danielle, I apologize you had such a negative experience. I hope you keep us in mind for future legal needs that may arise and give us an opportunity to better serve you.

reviews.text: They advertise " we help both employers and employees" but I called and they said they do not help employees.

I didn't even have to speak to one of the attorneys to know this is a good firm based on Carmen, intake/initial person you speak with prior to a consult. Although this firm couldn't assist me due to the situation and circumstances, Carmen was so kind and took time out of her day to listen to what I had going on and what I was looking for. If I ever run into any business litigation concerns in the further, I'll be contacting Carmen/this firm first.

Thank you for your kindness, Carmen.

Best,
Shelby
I got the vibe...Unless you are a "whale" of a potential client they seem to have no interest in assisting you. I would not recommend. May your experience be better than mine

Once again, as life happens,  the Davenport, Evan’s,Hurwitz& Smith Firm, along with my attorney, Mitch Peterson has done and is doing a stellar job representing me as well as the JSF organization.  After utilizing and experiencing much satisfaction before, I’m using them again. Much gratitude for their professional care and heartfelt sensitivity.  Attorney M. Peterson..the best…thanks!

Really frustrated, waited over a week for a response. Was informed would be notified if they will or will not take the case. I did find a lawyer, and this lawyer more responsive and on their A game. Davenport we were referred to you by another attorney. Sadly... they spoke too highly of your firm. Ty for wasting over a week.
They are highly professional and knowledgeable. They helped us a great deal.
I cannot in good faith recommend this office. Very unprofessional. Go anywhere else but here.

We needed to find an attorney to represent us in an unemployment case against the SD Department of Labor.  .  It was not easy finding an attorney to take this case as it is not considered a big money-maker for the law firm - which I heard from at least five different law firms.  Davenport, Evans, Hurwitz & Smith, was recommended to me so I called the office and was given the name and email for Eric.  He listened to the facts of the case and offered to look at the paperwork and give me an estimate of the cost.

Eric not only read up on similar cases but also made sure we were prepared for the hearing.  He met with each one of the witnesses called to testify and prepared us for the hearing. During the hearing it was obvious that he was totally prepared for this case.  He was very respectful to the other attorney and the judge but it was clear he took charge of the hearing.

The staff at Davenport, Evans, Hurwitz & Smith was polite, cordial and answered all my questions in a timely manner.  I have great confidence, trust and respect for Eric and this firm.

Used them for debt collection and were charged outrageous fees.  We wound up recovering almost nothing after their fees, even though we did most of the legwork and information retrieval.  Would not recommend this firm and would never use again.

After a year of no action on our case with our previous lawyer, we began working with Mitchell Peterson and his staff.  We have been very pleased with their professionalism, responsiveness and ability to make things happen.  We couldn't be happier with our decision.

Northern Truck Equipment Corp has been working with DEHS since 1987. They have served us in the areas of collections, litigation, HR and a host of other legal matters. We've always found them to be highly professional and demonstrate a good customer experience. Our company would recommend DEHS for any legal matters that may arise.

I had never needed an attorney before and found myself in a situation with my business where I knew it was beyond my scope. I was referred to Ashley Blake with Davenport, Evans, Hurwitz & Smith, LLP. I knew after our first phone call I had made the right call. Ashley immediately put my mind at ease. This was not a situation that anyone looks forward to, and frankly was quite scary for me.  Ashley impressed me with her professionalism, and just to know that someone had my back made it that much easier. She took the stress off of me!  Ashley was great about keeping me updated with developments and made it all easy to understand. If you ever find yourself in a situation that you do need an attorney, I would not hesitate to recommend Ashley Blake or Davenport, Evans, Hurwitz & Smith, LLP.
Knowledgeable, dependable, and honest firm.  Will handle all of your legal needs with the utmost professionalism.  Would highly recommend to all.
Mitch Peterson has a unique combination of talent, determination, passion and personality.

Over the last 40 years I have owned several business with that comes the need for attorneys.  Ten years ago I hired Mr. Mitch Peterson whom I've felt was first and foremost a devoted family man with values and ideals  that are essential in doing a great job for his clients in an age where money seams to dictate loyalty. I believe as in life a smart person tries to wrap themselves with quality, aggressive, organized, passionate and knowledgeable people or a great team. I believe Mr. Mitch Peterson and the rest of the firm at Davenport , Evans, Hurwitz & Smith, LLP in Sioux Falls S.D. is who I will call .

The best firm to protect your property rights, and quality of life in South Dakota.  Mitch Peterson from Davenport, Evans, Hurwitz & Smith understands what happens to families and community members when corporations move in and run over public health, local economies and rural community values.

We met with two other firms before we decided on Davenport, Evans and Hurwitz. They have been quick to respond to our questions and regularly communicate with us.Their diligence and attention to detail was apparent soon after they took our case and made a positive difference. If and when we need legal help in the future they will be our first choice.
Have made multiple attempts to contact this office for services. Keep being assured through their chat service but receive no emails, or phone calls back.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear Mr. Soulek,
Thank you for your feedback. I sincerely apologize for the frustration you’ve experienced. Our office uses Ngage Live Chat, an AI-assisted service, to initially help with inquiries, but I understand that you may have been expecting further follow-up, and I’m truly sorry if that didn’t happen.
Thank you for bringing this to my attention.
Sincerely,
George J. Nelson

reviews.text: George's help has been invaluable in my custody matter. I brought him a difficult case with an extremely high-conflict opponent. My former attorney was happy to kick the can down the road and let the opposing party walk on me. It had been several years; the case was going nowhere; and my daughter is growing up without a dad. I hired George in January of '24, and by June of '24 we had trial. Opposing counsel again tried to get that trial continued (opposition is happy to maintain the control they have with the status quo), but George made great objections and we went ahead with the hearing. Despite having far less resources than my opponent, and starting from the disadvantaged position of not currently having contact with my daughter, my ruling was favorable. I got some parent time, and the court did not heed opposition's ridiculous accusations against me nor their crazy attacks on my family. Unfortunately opposition appealed the ruling, so this fight is not over yet. I am thankful for what a great job George has done with my case so far, and am happy to have him on my side for the appeal. I wish I had retained him years ago when I first needed counsel on this case. Anyone in a difficult custody battle with an ex who has a high-conflict personality disorder needs someone like George on their side.

Best Attorney! Very professional and hard working. He is the absolute best around and I would highly recommend him! He is patient and really goes through everything. He is great in a courtroom and working with you. I have had to use him for multiple things and it’s been a very good experience.

DO NOT USE George Nelson to represent you! He is dishonest, rude, arrogant, a bully and a narcissist. He lacks integrity and professionalism, for him to reach out and contact people to write him a review after he poorly represented them just says it all about his character. R.C. has great attorney’s, you will benefit greatly by using one of them and not George Nelson.
reviews.ownerResponse: I do not know this person. I have no past clients with this name. In fact, there is no one with this name in the whole state of South Dakota. I wish Google had more filters to prevent libelous reviews from being posted.

reviews.text: Every went smoothly, and was explained in advance.  Also great updates, and all questions answered during the process.  Thank you so much.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your kind words! We're thrilled to hear that everything went smoothly and that you found our updates and explanations helpful. If you have any more questions or need further assistance in the future, don't hesitate to reach out. Thank you for choosing us!

reviews.text: George and his team did an outstanding job handling my out of state divorce. I highly recommend him.
George was understanding of our request. It was completed in a timely manner.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks, Wayne for your kind words. They are much apprecaited.

reviews.text: I honestly couldn't have asked for better representation or a better person throughout my divorce proceedings. My kids and I are all doing wonderfully thanks to George. Much gratitude and many many thanks to him!
George Nelson and his team were amazing from beginning to the end. Would definitely recommend them for divorce/child custody cases. Affordable and reliable!

I was very happy with the service I received for my divorce. George or Vicky were available to listen and help me during that stressful time. They were either in the office or quick to respond to my emails. I highly recommend George Nelson and his team.

So very, very helpful. Was given very informative and genuinely helpful advice. Couldn't have asked for better support when I needed it. Very friendly, caring staff that you can tell care about your situation and are not just there for money.

This was my husband's  lawyer for our divorce. Vicky, the paralegal first tried to serve me electronically  which is an unacceptable method of service in South Dakota.
Once i was served in person I noticed Vicky had my maiden name on the divorce decree. I called her to let her know what my legal nane was and asked to be re- served under my legal name
She once again tried to serve my via email and then  she became argumentative, explaining that it would cost more money to serve me in person.
Then she  hung up on me!
I can't imagine a more unprofessional  response to HER errors!
Again this firm was not mine, but based on these interactions  I'd certainly  steer clear.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Ms. Silverman for what I would deem a very favorable 1-star review from an opponent, as you obviously did not like the results of your divorce and what I was able to do for your ex-husband.

reviews.text: Definitely an amazing attorney to work with, worked with him for 1 year plus and nothing but great work from him; 100% cares and understand the situation and will go above and beyond for his clients, recommend!!!!!!!!!!
George Nelson is a Great attorney.  I've been working with him for years and I am never disappointed or discouraged.
Good family attorney.
Absolutely wonderful Attorney!

Kit was my attorney for my case against my landlord when I suffered an injury after an accident in a house I had rented.

He’s with you for the long haul. Thinks in his feet in arbitration hearings and is tough, an excellent advocate for those who have a legitimate case.

He has empathy for victims and those injured due to someone else’s negligence.

I recommend him to anyone, he came to Florida from South Dakota at my convenience to hold a hearing. I appreciated that.

He’s your best bet.
Ryan Fuller is great at getting back to his clients.
Krause can make it happen! Just not as fast as you would like sometimes

He seemed to be a good a nice guy and makes everything sound good. Never could get ahold of anyone in the office. I  called him several times I could never get ahold of anyone in office . I kept calling him one day never no  answer then my sister in law called right afterwards and they had answer. Also they told me they were going to send an email witch never did. He seemed to be a good but could never get ahold of anyone in office. After my first visit knowing I had alot going on. Being left with Rentavating my home I got left with. Aslo Having a 10 yr old, 8month and expecting in the next 2 months. Then called one day told them I was on my way out there not ever being able to get ahold of anyone. They put me on hold then finally got to talk to someone. Then they had told me I'd got thrown under the bus. I'm sorry but in my opinion very very poor law firm

Matt Abel, Nyla Maag and the team at The Krause Law Firm are top notch.  They are the perfect mix of professional and compassionate.  My hat is off to them.  I am sure they are just as great and effective in other areas but when it comes to estates and inheritance I would recommend The Krause Law Firm over and over again.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your kind words, Kyle.

reviews.text: The secretary that answered my calls has a very unprofessional tone and doesn't know anything. Maybe it's just a case base but I have been getting the run around every time I call for answers regarding paperwork issue.  Jason  handles himself professionally gathering from the one time I met with him.
reviews.ownerResponse: Luis: We would be happy to remedy the less than ideal experience you received with our Firm. We always strive to meet the needs of all parties with whom we interact. Please contact our office at your convenience to discuss this issue further. We look forward to hearing from you.

reviews.text: I had a car accident and the other party was trying to sue me. State Farm hired Lauren Rossitto from the Fairmont Office to represent me. Wow was I pleasantly surprised on how great Lauren was. She definitely went way above and beyond.  Excellent communicator.  Had great results from Lauren's representation.
Found a great store find and my stone.

Eric and his team flawlessly helped me get through an unfortunate situation, from the start Eric was kind, and very knowledgeable. Doris made the whole process quick and easy, and I am thankful for her kindness, and guidance. This was my first time hiring a legal professional, and I would recommend this law firm to anyone.

Eric and his staff are responsible and up front with information and attorney fees. There's no guessing with this office and I am grateful to have found such a wonderful resource. Worth all five stars.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for the incredible 5-star review Stacey! We take pride in our diligence and are happy to hear you're satisfied.

reviews.text: Very nice people. Took my complaint seriously and saved me a ton of hassle. Thank you!
I chose this law firm for my legal needs, and they did a wonderful job representing me and guiding me through the process.  I would recommend them to anyone.
Eric and his Team handled a minor incident i had with great communication and professionalism and would highly recommend them!

Eric and the team are awesome.  Very responsive and knowledgeable.  Their customer service was top notch.  You can't go wrong with this team.  Thank you for taking care of us during an unfortunate situation.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the 5-star review Terry! Glad to hear about your trust in us. It was a pleasure working with your family!

reviews.text: Eric is a knowledgeable and tenacious attorney who is like a big fish in a small pond. He is direct, to the point, and I have felt confident for a long time that he has had my best interest in mind.  I can see him as a future judge one day because of his ability to see the bigger picture, along with his forthcoming nature that fully encompasses his strong sense of justice. Big things ahead for this guy! 😃
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the 5-Star review Alicia! We love to hear your confidence in Eric!

reviews.text: Awesome people..they fought my case and won..I didn't even have to speak...Spencer was awesome..👍
Eric was an awesome attorney. Would 100% recommend him. This law firm was great at communicating and handled everything very well.

Unfortunately they left us out to dry, lost our case, our lawyer didn't even ask the right questions or brought forth our evidence barley fought for us,,then ignored our emails pertaining mechanic liens which were time sensitive! When I emailed the secretary to ask why my emails aren't being answered again she said the lawyer we had quit and the other lawyers case load is too big to handle my cases...they charged us just for them to read an email on how the lawyer was doing when he got in his car accident.
In my experience I would NOT use or recommend...very unorganized.

Eric was amazing to work with! Answered all my questions and his office staff would always get back to me at a reasonable time! Helped me out tremendously and always reassured me that he would make sure that I would get the best outcome possible, which was true! HIGHLY recommend this law firm!! Super great people to work with!

Eric is a fantastic attorney. He always returned my calls quickly and treated me with dignity and respect.  I was arrested with psilocybin mushrooms I used to treat my service connected PTSD.  He was able to keep my out of prison and get me a sentence of community. His office employees were VERY courteous and polite.  He was assigned as my public defender but gave me better representation than a hired attorney.  I have mental health issues which complicated my case and our interactions but he was patient and understanding.  He is the only lawyer I would ever consider hiring in the future.  Thanks so much Eric.

Eric was extraordinary with his knowledge and service in addressing our needs.  He was prompt and solution-driven.  Not only did we receive exactly what we needed in the end, but he made the process enjoyably seamless working by our side the entire time.  Highly recommend.

Eric and his team were great to work with and propelled me forward in starting my own business. I am so thankful they were able to help me navigate the legal waters of filing my business formation. I highly recommend their expertise!

Schlimgen Law Firm has been a great asset for our company, demonstrating a deep understanding of complex legal matters. Their high integrity and the expertise of lawyers like Eric and Spencer rank them among the best. They provide intelligent advice and have a strong grasp of legal intricacies, making them a top choice for anybody in need of reliable legal counsel.
reviews.ownerResponse: Wow! Thank you for the 5-Star review. It's great to hear we're your top choice.

reviews.text: Eric was a big help when I needed legal assistance. He was pleasant to work with every step of the way, would definitely use him again.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the 5-star review Alex! It was a pleasure working with you as well.
Thank you for the 5-stars Linda!

reviews.text: Notably more expensive than anticipated, but ultimately fair. The doc requested ws far more involved and comprehensive than originally imagined. Much thanks

reviews.text:
Bang McCullen represents an apartment complex in Rapid City, where I previously lived.

For one thing, the lease from Bangs McCullen was rife with typos, broken cross-references, and inapplicable language (likely from older versions).

For another, when I reached out to our leasing office for clarification on an unclear provision, the leasing office (understandably) reached out the Bangs McCullen for clarity. Bangs McCullen responded with hostility, did not clarify the issue with their language, and suggested that my lease office pursue me for attorneys' fees for daring to ask the question (which, to be clear, they did not do). They even offered to file a lawsuit.

Maybe they respect you more if you're directly their client, but if you're a peripheral or opposite party, they'll raise the temperature in the room and invite disputes.

JOHN DILL was my court appointed attorney for an IVC (INVOLUNTARY COMMITAL) that I was desperate to obtain for a loved one. Upon my initial consultation with Dill, he spent most of my time persuading me there was a very strong chance this was going to fail. He handed me some pamphlets on treatment options and I walked out of his office feeling extremley hopeless and defeated.

I was also confused as to why my case was handed to an attorney who had such a negative outlook on this particular type of litigation, but I guess it was a win win for him, regardless of the outcome. I'm sure he could sense my naiveté and may have felt that if he could convince me not to proceed, it would mean no sweat off his back and he would still make money. Which he did.

I ended up giving up on the notion, but ultimately decided to call him back a few weeks later to find out if I could still proceed. Once again, he tried very hard to convince me that my chances of success were slim to none. Despite his efforts, I told him that I would like to go through with the IVC and we set a date to meet for proceeding with the case. However, I ultimately ended up calling his office and canceled everything. Sensing from him such a pessimistic outlook on the matter, I had a feeling things would likely not end in my favor and I would be out a lot of money.

A few months later, and even more desperate than before, I decided to file for another IVC. However, this time I was (quite thankfully) appointed a different attorney. Within the first few minutes of speaking with her, I was releif stricken. She was the epitome of optimism! Not once did she try to convince me that I was wasting my time, or sway me in the other direction. She made no promises, however she remained OPTIMISTIC Throughout the case and followed through with everything. Her hardwork and dedication paid off very quickly and we WON my case and my loved one received the treatment we'd all been hoping for.

Fast forward a few months. I received my bill for Mr. Dills services. Among one of the charges was a fee for over $300 for IVC drafts that Dill drew up. Papers that I never laid eyes on or received copies of prior to or after the case being closed.

I called his office to inquire about the charge and request copies of the paperwork and ended up arguing with his ill mannered secretary for several minutes about the matter. She basically walked me around in circles trying to justify the charge. She also proudly informed me that Mr. Dill had already been paid by the court and that there was really nothing I could do about it now.

Oh, but there is....

I can leave this review in hopes that I may save someone else their time and money. I was charged over $500 for this man to pick up my case and then masterfully persuade me to not follow through with it.

There are other attorneys out there that will take on IVC cases with confidence and optimism. Through trial and error I found a great one. One worth giving my hard earned money to.

Do your research first! Call and ask questions. Don't settle for less than you deserve!

**This review is based soley on my own, personal experience with Claggette & Dill.** Mr. Dill did finally mail me copies of the paperwork that I was charged for, along with a nice, condescending letter. I'll let this be response to your letter Mr. Dill, and my most sincere opinion of you and your "services".

reviews.text: Kelly Peterson is a truly excellent attorney, and a very good person.  She got out of bed at 1:00 AM and showed up at 3:00 AM to represent me via videoconfernce in a hearing that was held in England. Her husband also came to see the proceedings. Kelly was well-prepared and focused throughout the 5-hour hearing, and kept me from saying things that would have damaged my case.  Kelly was calm, cool, and collected, and in the end, the judge gave the other party far less than I had offerred in an attempt at settlement.
reviews.ownerResponse: Larry this was years ago but I still share the story with others to this very day! I remember getting up with Kelly and going to watch this tired and having no idea about how she could represent you. Truly fascinating. The Judge took about 15 minutes explaining that Kelly wasn't licensed to practice in (Wales I think), that she was an American lawyer and that there "wasn't a process by which she could make an appearance," aside from the Hague convention that allowed her to. He then asked her if she was asking to be recognized under that provision. She said yes and was recognized. The lawyer for the petitioner then gave an opening statement. He spoke for about 30 minutes all the while telling us that he was not going to go into every detail! He would speak by essentially repeating the points he was trying to make in different ways. I was very tired but because of the way he spoke if I (zoned out) I could perfectly understand the point he was trying to make. The law is particularly well suited for the English way of speaking. The way they communicate leaves no room for ambiguity. If anyone reads this and doesn't understand what I'm trying to convey, watch Gerri Nell's cross examination of Oscar Pistorius.  Truly an epic. It goes on for more than two or three days. (excluding afternoon tea breaks). John M. Fitzgerald

If you’re reading this review then I’ll assume you are looking for an attorney for one reason or another and if it’s for anything like what I’ve gone through then you have my condolences. I really wish I could rate with more stars but unfortunately 5 is the max.

I cannot express the gratitude and greatfullness I have for my attorney Brad J. Lee! I was injured in 2015 and like most insurance companies I had a fight on my hands. I looked around South Dakota and called several different law firms to represent me and found most if not all wanted me to do 98% of the leg work while they got paid and to be honest, none of them sounded like they could care about me and even less about taking my case. I was borderline ready to just give up and then, I met Brad!

Brad took the time to actually get to know me, hear my issues, understand me as a person and genuinely cared about well-being and outcome. He fought for me and he fought hard! I have twin girls that I take care of and my injuries really limited what I can do with them. Brad seen them as a part of me, seen us as a family and a father that will forever struggle. Without his help and representation I am certain big insurance would have walked all over me and my girls would have suffered the most.

No one ever askes to get injured on the job. No one wants to have life long disabilities and most people want to go to work, support their families, pay their bills and enjoy life but sometimes, bad things happen to good people. If you’re a good person and something bad has happened to you then you are going to need a great person on your side and in my humble opinion, that person is Brad J. Lee!

This is not an ad nor am I trying to sell someone to you. I am an actual client of Brads and I will feel forever indebted to him and his staff for doing such an amazingly outstanding and wonderful job. I came to Brad a broken man and although I may never be the same due to my injuries, I can at least walk away knowing I had the absolute best (work comp) attorney fighting for me and my girls. We are looking at a brighter, more promising future because our attorney seen us as people, as a family and not just dollar signs walking around.

If you need an attorney because something bad happened to someone good then please, give Brad a call. Tell him Scott sent you. Don’t become a number or a dollar sign to someone who is either inept or just has too much on their plate to treat you with the respect and dignity you deserve. You can and probably should call around but please, give Brad a call before you “settle” for someone or some firm that won’t see you as a person. You seriously have nothing at all to loose and everything to gain. I would have no problem trusting Brad with my life. I just can’t say enough good things about him!

Again, I can’t stress this enough, I am an actual client and if you have been injured then I just want to see you get the absolute best professional help in resolving your case. I would recommend him to anyone and would use him exclusively for all my legal matters if that were possible. Brad is a great guy and his team is phenomenal! I’m sure he’d be more then happy to speak with you so give him a call, you’ll be glad you did.

Good luck, I hope you are successful in your search.
Paul is the best! Such a great lawyer. He has been such a blessing to our family!

Tony (Anthony Teesdale) is my councilor; lawyer; attorney. I do not use the word "councilor" lightly, I will go into further detail later. A little about my situation. I am currently going through a very nasty divorce with kids involved. To say the least, before I hired Tony, all odds were stacked against me, along with the court system that seems to favor the mother, plus I had a wrinkle in my past that was being used against me.  With a prayer and some diligent researching, I found Tony and hired him. We have been working on my case for over 2 years. When I first hired Tony, I had zero visitation with my kids, fast forward a couple years and now I have a set weekly visitation schedule with overnights. We are currently  working on finalizing my divorce with a realistic chance to get my children 50/50. During the past 2 years, I have personally gone through a lot of emotions, each time that I NEEDED to get ahold of Tony, he would make time to communicate with me. When I say councilor, he is my councilor. He listens to me, validates my feelings, then makes a professional recommendation. I could not ask any more from this man. I am so blessed to have him on my side. I would recommend Tony to anyone. For those whom feel the world is against them and all odds are stacked against them, give Tony a chance because this man will turn the tides into your favor. He is built with integrity, always honest and realistic.

Micheal Paulson quoted my sister and I at $4,000 to handle our dad’s estate after our dad passed away. He had all of the information he needed to give us a proper quote and nothing ever changed along the way. It took him 9 months to complete the estate. It was a simple estate. In the end Mr Paulson sent us a bill for $7,300 without any communication along the way that the fee had changed and without any explanation of why his fee increased. After many emails back and forth about this he finally sent us a list of his fees that were completely not agreeable and lacked any sense. We don’t believe that he was ever keeping organized records of his time spent on our estate- he just guessed. And at $250 per hour for 9 months his guessed time was way off-  twice the amount of the original bid that we expected. The way he handled our dads estate was dishonest and heartbreaking. We couldn’t fight him over it because we had no proof of his original quote since it was discussed in person. I would never hire him again and I would not recommend him to anyone. I learned from this experience to get quotes in writing so if you need to take someone like this to court over something this dishonest at least you would have proof to do it.

We were the victims of a Class 3 felony fraud case involving an individual who fled the state of South Dakota. Scott James provided exceptional support, guiding us through the complex process of locating the perpetrator, pursuing a civil lawsuit, and initiating collection efforts with an out-of-state attorney.

Thanks to Scott’s expertise and diligence, a process that often takes years was resolved with a verdict against the perpetrator in under a year. His clear communication, consistent follow-up, and unwavering commitment to our case were truly remarkable.

I wholeheartedly recommend Scott James to anyone facing similar legal challenges.

She was always very patient and willing to sit and clarify whatever I didn't understand to the point of understanding before I signed anything. Most importantly, she was severely compassionate with every interaction, proving she cared for my well-being during and post claim. These characteristics consistently eased any of my anxieties I had along the way in closing and allowed me to trust that I was in good hands.  Just a kind souled, and well-meaning individual that truly knows what she is doing.

Communication is Key, in this business. A client comes to a Law Firm with diffrent levels of education of Law. Its the Councels job to explain, every move made by them in a case. reviews.ownerResponse: I’m sorry you were dissatisfied.  I agree with you that communication is indeed important, which is why I thoroughly explain—to a practical extent—the process, documents, and actions in all stages of a matter. Attorney Mitchell Johnson has been my Attorney since 2017.  I first used his services for a highly contested divorce which went my way through and through.  That divorce was appealed to the SD Supreme Court and also to the US Supreme Court.  Mitch did an outstanding job representing me and showed his knowledge and ability as an attorney by never losing an appeal.  He is very capable!  The thing I like the most about Mitch is he was not afraid to keep me accountable and on track for what was best for my kids.  I always appreciated his honesty and candor!

Best attorney in Rapid City!  We are so glad we went with Mitch when we needed child custody legal help!  Mitch is tough, tenacious, highly knowledgeable and was there whenever we needed him, days/nights/weekends.  Thanks, Mitch, for all you have done for us!

Mitch has been extremely helpful in everything he does. He is very straight forward & to the point which is what I needed when walking into this. He doesn't judge for your past but is more than willing to help make the future better. When I make a mistake, he doesn't make me feel stupid or like I'm a nuisance.... He just makes sure that I correct it. Honestly the only attorney I've worked with but he is definitely exactly what I had hoped for!! Thank you Mitch!
I could not have picked a better attorney then Mr. Johnson.  He took on my case even though it was a big mess.  I recommend Mr. Johnson, if you want your case done right.

I wasn’t told to bring anything for evidence,  we were supposed to speak prior to court but I was blown off until hours before but she couldn’t find the court house so that wasn’t the amount of time I should have had.  In conversing all she could tell us about was the new expensive office she was moving to.  In court she didn’t address what was needed to be addressed and was merely repeating what was already in the paperwork already. And to add the cherry on top she forgot my name in the middle of court… she called me by my daughter’s name until the judge corrected her.  I literally was screwed over on many different things throughout but mostly she screwed over my daughter being forced into a situation that risked her well being.  Spend the money and go elsewhere i had to constantly pester and push yet it did no good she would forget us each time…

I would like to report concerns regarding the professional conduct of Stacey Leasure, who is employed as a paralegal. It has come to my attention that she regularly discloses privileged and confidential legal information to individuals who are not authorized to receive it. I have personally received unsolicited details pertaining to another individual’s legal matter.

I do not understand how such disclosures could be permissible under any ethical or legal standard governing paralegals or legal support staff. Despite efforts to identify an appropriate avenue to file an anonymous complaint, I have been unable to locate a mechanism to do so.

Given the seriousness of these breaches, I believe this individual should be investigated for failing to uphold the confidentiality and ethical obligations required of someone in her position.
reviews.ownerResponse: We are committed to providing a respectful environment for both our team and our clients. After review, we cannot confirm the interaction described here. We welcome direct communication from anyone with a legitimate concern so we can address it appropriately.

Just like many of my care teams after my accident I view David’s law firm as family. Every single person there was always such a big help to me in many different ways. reviews.ownerResponse: Paula, unfortunately, we are not able to take on every case. In your case, you were represented all the way through the whole process including all the way to hearing by a different law firm. Unfortunately, that law firm lost your case and then refused to appeal your case for you. As was explained to you in your free consultation, our firm does not normally take on Appeals Council matters when a different law firm represented the claimant in the initial hearing. However, we wanted to provide you with a fair assessment of your case by reviewing your file and the hearing Decision. We wanted to determine if your best option was either for us to refer you to a different attorney, or if you would be better served by simply reapplying for benefits. We did our best to assess whether or not we could assist you and communicated with you transparently throughout the process. We also provided you with information on how to move forward as indicated during the consultation. We understand that this is difficult and disappointing for you. We wish you the very best moving forward and thank you for considering our office.

reviews.text: First off. If there was a zero star option, l would've chosen that. Transparency! Be transparent on what your fees are up front, and the retainer fee will be to move forward with the case. Don't reel people in, making them believe they have a case and you are willing to help. If you just lost your job, would you sit down and talk to someone for 350 bucks! To have them tell you we need another 5k to get started at the end. Now that I'm out of the money that I use to feed my family in this failing economy. I hope you    all are so very proud of what you do. To pay someone that kind of money to talk about what they already know... my dog gives better advice, and it's free... You should be ashamed of yourselves. Be honest, be transparent, and have some respect. Run away and save your money.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Adam,
Thank you for sharing your feedback. At Goosmann Law Firm, we believe in transparency and partnership with our clients from the very beginning. Our intake process is designed to ensure clear communication, including outlining fees and expectations upfront, so that we can work toward common goals together. I had an incredibly frustrating experience with Pohlman Law Firm while pursuing a Workers’ Compensation claim. Initially, they seemed eager to help, but things quickly took a suspicious turn. The attorney started pressuring me to shift the focus of my lawsuit away from my employer and go after a third party, which made no sense given my case. Even more troubling, he suddenly pushed me to settle for a ridiculously low amount, acting more like the defendant’s attorney than my own.

He claimed I wasn’t cooperating, despite the fact that I provided every document and piece of information he requested, often multiple times. On several occasions, he insisted I drop everything and get on the phone with him immediately, showing an odd reluctance to put anything in writing, which raised red flags.

Then, out of nowhere, he dropped my case entirely—right before an important hearing—leaving me scrambling without legal representation. I don’t know if he’s being influenced by the companies involved or if he’s just extremely unprofessional and bad at his job. Either way, I would not recommend Pohlman Law Firm to anyone seeking competent legal help.

I would highly recommend him to anyone that is in need of a work comp lawyer! He listens and genuinely cares about people.  I thank him for absolutely everything he did for me!

These attorneys advocated, represented and counseled me to a fully favorable decision in my Social Security Disabily case.

For this being my first time with having to hire a lawyer it was almost effortless for me. They do the hard work and all of the leg work. I was always in constant contact with them and never had a question of what was going on. Very though and trustworthy!

My car accident happened January 25, 2020, 2 shoulder surgies, and 3 years later, it's finally over.

Ed thank you for the long hard fight! Your resilience and persistence paid off.

Eileen, you are the best!
So easy to talk to, and work. You always kept me abreast of all new developments, and explained things in layman's terms.

You both are incredibly smart and willing to go the extra mile.

Thank you so much!!!!

I will sing like a canary about the services I received!!!
Very compassionate and caring!

I was hurt on the job, and Ed Keane took my case and did a fantastic job. If it weren’t for him spending endless hours getting information, traveling , making phone calls, always keeping me informed of everything, going above and beyond, along with his assistant Eileen, I wouldn’t have won my case. I recommend everyone who needs a great lawyer to call Ed, you won’t be sorry. Thank you Ed and Eileen for all you did for me!
I knew the day Mr. Keane accepted my personal injury claim that the chances of a fair and equatable resolution greatly increased. I was not mistaken, Thank you Ed & Eileen!

After not having any success with a different attorney, we fortunately found Ed Keane and his wonderful staff. The workers compensation case case was truly a difficult one.  They worked tirelessly, always keeping us up to date, answering all questions, and promptly returning calls. They treated us like family. I never once doubted that they were giving it their all. Even after the case was won, they continue to check in with us. Ed is not only a fantastic attorney but a great person. We are truly grateful!

After being injured on the job and having the company I worked for unwilling to take responsibility for my medical bills I went to Ed Keane for help. Mr. Keane and his staff were very helpful, kind, and always returned my calls. They did a great job explaining the entire process to me such as the fact it would cost me nothing if I didn't win. Well, we did win. I had to do very little work as far as providing the medical bills, some of which had been turned over to collections, and they took care of the rest. I felt like they really cared for me as a person and had my best interests in mind. As a testament to Mr. Keane's caring ways, he even provides a safe ride program for free cab rides during the holiday season! I would highly recommend visiting Keane Law Firm if ever you find yourself in need of legal assistance.

I am updating my review to say I am exercising my first amendment rights. Drew Skjoldal actually is billing my dead stepmothers estate for attorneys fees representing Black Hills Advocate which makes NO SENSE as Jenny Schmidt of Black Hills Advocate was not her Guardian in 2024. Her daughter was. So her daughter wants to be reimbursed for fees associated with Guardianship along with Jenny Schmidt?  Hmmm. I smell a rat. I will be glad to withdraw my complaint when I receive a detailed breakdown (by minute) of the $15,000 you are billing saying you represented Black Hills Advocate when Jenny Schmidt of Black Hills Advocate WAS NOT her permanent guardian. What a Scam!
I will be filing a complaint with the South Dakota Bar Association against Drew Skjoldal.  Unethical billing practices. I just received a bill for over $14,000 for my dead stepmothers probate.  I have nothing to do with her probate. Her daughter Kelly Camerer is the Personal Representative.  Why in Gods name would I be receiving a bill listing invoices with no explanation to pay for Black Hills Advocate starting in 2024?  I am a senior citizen with my only income Ss and have no involvement in the ongoing litigation
Great attorneys.
Very knowledgeable and informed me of alot that I was not aware of. Also very pleasant to talk with. Comfortable conversations.
See Eric, Dillon, and Drew for estate planning expertise!
Outstanding legal counsel.
If you can get a call back!  they do great work.

My husband and I have been blessed to have found and worked with Les for many years. his expertise, professionalism, & knowledge is second to none. The ladies that run the office are so friendly and helpful it is always a delight to visit with them as well. We can’t say enough he is one of the best.
Helpful, helpful, helpful! Knowledgeable!
Great team to work with!!
Had tort claim but Jon refused to help me and instead recommend different lawyers. I wouldn't recommend this place for help
You won't find a more sharp, caring, thorough, and ethical Attorney than Jon LaFleur. He is the best and an awesome family man!
Listed as attorneys that do civil litigation but don't call them for civil litigation. The lady that answered the phone informed me they don't practice that law.
So far so good...Mr. Lafleur seems attentive thus far.  He seems also to be knowledgeable in insurance law.  The firm is well established, this, I'm sure, is why.
Awesome firm great lawyers with real integrity
I've worked with Tyler multiple times, and he has always been professional and great to work with. I recommend anyone to Tyler in Sioux Falls.

I dealt with Tyler Haigh, He represented Progressive Insurance .
I was the plaintiff,  we settled out of court.
Tyler Haigh was the ultimate professional, knowledgeable, down to earth and caring!
He maintained good communication and treated me with the utmost respect!

Thanks, Greatly appreciated!
Quincy

Got up the nerve to call to see if I could get  some guidance regarding a case, they completely declined and said I'm on my own without hearing my situation. Didn't even direct me to someone better suited to advise the situation I was needing to inquire about. Surprised to see good reviews on them and yet I was introduced to a brick wall. So much for being representatives.
Working for the people

If I could Give 6 stars I would. This law firm was fantastic from the moment we met with them we knew we had made the right decision in who we had chosen to represent us. You can not go wrong with the caring & respectful lawyers that work at Fuller, Williamson, Nelsen & Preheim. They went above and beyond to take care of our family in a very difficult time and I would highly recommend them to anyone in need of a Lawyer.

I'm ever so grateful for Fuller, Williamson, Nelsen & Preheim law firm.  The 1st day I met Derek, Eric & Andy, I felt very comfortable and knew that they were going to get the job done.  They worked very hard for me to get what I deserved.  I'm so thankful for what they did for me. Yes, it does take time to get the job done but have faith in them like I did.  I will always recommend this law firm to anyone.  Thanks Derek, Eric and Andy!!!

Derek and the team took charge and made me feel very confident from the first phone call and throughout the process.  Their knowledge and experience was very obvious.  World class!  Highly recommend them!

I had the privilege of working with Scott Armstrong on a complex partition action lawsuit, and I couldn't be more pleased with the exceptional legal representation he provided. From our very first consultation, Scott took the time to thoroughly understand every detail of my case, demonstrating an impressive depth of knowledge and a commitment to personalized service that immediately set him apart.

What truly stood out was his accessibility and responsiveness—qualities that are often hard to find in an attorney. No matter the time or complexity of my questions, he was always available to provide clear, thoughtful guidance and ensured I felt informed and confident at every step. His ability to break down intricate legal matters into easy-to-understand explanations was invaluable throughout the process.

Beyond his legal expertise, Scott is a true professional who genuinely cares about his clients’ best interests. He approaches each case with a level of dedication, integrity, and strategic thinking that makes all the difference. His attention to detail, combined with his ability to anticipate challenges and proactively address them, gave me peace of mind during a stressful legal battle.

If you’re looking for an exceptional attorney who is not only highly skilled but also compassionate and client-focused, Scott Armstrong is the one to trust. I wholeheartedly recommend him to anyone in need of strong, knowledgeable, and dedicated legal representation.

I can't thank Scott Armstrong enough for his dedication and expertise in handling my case. He has been incredibly thorough, responsive, and strategic throughout the entire process. His knowledge of family law and attention to detail gave me confidence, and he always kept me informed about the best steps to take. Scott truly cares about his clients and fights for what is right. If you need a lawyer who is sharp, professional, and committed to getting results, I highly recommend him!"

Scott represented me in a rather unique divorce case. He was able to provide insight and great legal advice. He conducted himself in a professional manner even when the opposing side lied and used underhanded techniques. It was good to have an attorney with integrity. Scott even got my dog back for me! The outcome was satisfactory and I would recommend Scott Armstrong to anyone that is in need of a knowledgeable divorce attorney.
Scott has been great. He stepped into a mess and has done an amazing job representing me. He just gets things done. Thank you Scott.

I highly recommend Attorney Scott Armstrong. His personalized approach and commitment to understanding the unique aspects of your case make him an easy choice. Scott has very reasonable pricing for his expertise and his accessibility when you need him make him an exceptional choice for legal representation. He's a true professional who genuinely cares about his clients' best interests. If you're in search of a dedicated and proficient attorney, Scott Armstrong is the one to trust.
Great attorney !
Scott is great, friendly and very helpful!

The system may be broken but not Mr. Bottaro's system!  I just graduated college getting a diploma in Med Coding.  What most do not know, me included, is some fields will drain you financially, mentally and physically before you see a positive for the hard work.   I was in a car accident to which I was not at fault.  Since I had to drop to strict liability and that only helps if you are at fault and compensates other and legally driving when financially can't get more insurance.  I now have a damaged car, and no compensation nor affordable legal advice due to I followed the law and there were no injuries. Public defenders office straight out told me since 'I am not being sued, we can't help you.' Prior his call, I wanted to give up thinking 'law abiding' is a crock, I got a call with FANTASTIC advice and consult!  Thank you Mr. Bottaro for giving me faith again in 'doing the right thing!' Only one who saw me as a human not an ATM, plus amazing consult/advice! One of the good guys!

I cannot recommend Tim Battoro enough! He handled my car accident case with incredible professionalism and care from start to finish. From the moment I met him, I felt like he truly had my back and was there to look out for me. Tim is extremely knowledgeable—he walked me through every step of the process, explained things in a way that made sense, and made sure I never felt alone in navigating the situation. I always felt like I was in good hands, and he worked hard to make sure I was treated fairly. If you’re ever in need of an attorney who will fight for you and genuinely cares, Tim Battoro is the one you want on your side!

Dear Tim & Alicia,

Words cannot express my deepest gratitude for the best legal services that you both provided throughout my case.  I appreciate your exceptional skills, guidance , and commitment to achieving the possible result. Your kindness, empathy, caring, and attention did not go unnoticed.  I am truly grateful for everything you both have done. I would not hesitate to recommend your services to anyone in need of outstanding legal representation.

Warm regards,

Tram Nguyen
reviews.ownerResponse: Anh, Alicia and I really enjoyed working with you. You are a great client and person. You are one of those special people who makes our community better. Thank you for being you.

Tim Bottaro and his staff (specifically Alicia ) are the absolute best! Very attentive,caring, experienced and knowledgeable.  My case turned out better than I could’ve hoped for!
They kept me up to date with everything. Every question I had was always answered the same day.

And in the future, feel free to contact me any time with any issues you may be having. I am always happy to help steer you in the right direction.

reviews.text: Amazing lawyer went out of his way to help me out in ways I have never seen any other lawyer do. Beyond thankful for him and his team thank you Tim Bottaro and everything you stand for ❤️

reviews.text: Very friendly and great people to work with!They dont hesitate to help were they can!would definitely recommend them and use them in the future again!
I am very satisfied with the legal services of Matt McCoy.  He was up-front with the fees he charged, and he was helpful in assisting me to exit my timeshare.

Was quoted a price over the phone, then when the bill was presented it was $100.00 more. Said Oops, I was quoted the wrong price but they would honor it.
Then when I handed the debit card, was told only cash or check. So had to drive 5 miles back home, should have been explained at the time the appt was made. Then when I got home I found my name misspelled, so back in again on Monday.

Was looking to set up a family trust. Garland was very knowledgable and put things in laymans terms making it easy to understand. He was able to help us put it all together in a timely manner. The office assistant was friendly, pleasant and helpful. I would  highly reccomend this law firm to anyone.

I have used their services several times. Always professional.  Help set up my estate documents and walked me through everything so I could completely understand. Highly recommend their services and it's nice to have a local attorney.
Attorney Garland Goff was willing to meet with me to discuss property easements. He was very helpful and informative. I highly recommend his Law Firm.
Chrystal was so polite and has a great smile the minute you walk in the door. Garland answered all of our questions. He is very knowledgeable!! Very happy with our visit!

I called 14 law offices in the Black Hills area and Garland was the only attorney that would speak with me about my issue. He was knowledgeable, gave great explanations and sound advice. I came out of the meeting feeling heard and with confidence of what to do next. I would recommend him to anyone!
Thankful we have this business in Custer! They were very helpful and informative. He sat and talked with me for 30 minutes and didn't charge me. I would highly recommend him.

Great place for help. His office manager was so welcoming and friendly when we walked in the door. Both Garland Goff and his office manager were best help we could ask for and even spent time visiting.  Highly recommended!!!
My husband and I recently consulted with Garland on a legal matter and he really put our minds at ease. We will continue to use him in the future and recommend him to family and friends.
Can't say enough good things about Garland and Carolyn.  They make the process of creating legal documents and giving legal advice.  I recommend  them for all your legal needs.
We enjoyed working with these professionals. Would highly recommend.
Highly recommend! Such professional and friendly service.
My Wife and I contacted Garland Goff concerning a situation on our property near Custer. He and Carolyn were very helpful and gave advice that was very helpful. Thank you.
We really appreciate Garland and Carolyn. They did a great job at setting up our wills and living wills. Would highly recommend them.

Garland Goff and his assistant Carolyn are amazing.  It was a no hassle or hustle experience (estate planning) and this I say because normally some lawyers make you feel you work for them and not the other way around. I would recommend Garland to anyone and he’s a real treasure in our little town in the Black Hills. He’s the best lawyer we ever hired!

I had recently used Garland for a guardianship and conservatorship for someone.  He explained the process of immediate and permanent status.  He processed the emergency papers and the permanent papers along with required court hearings.  He and his staff were courteous and diligent with each interaction.  I would recommend his office.
